text:
Mukanaki (ムカナキ, Mukanaki) Hunter × Hunter Hunter Association Official Issue: Hunter's Guide; Character & World Official Databook (pg. 208) is a Greed Island player. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 133 

Appearance

Mukanaki has neatly combed hair and prominent sideburns. He is seen wearing a sweater with a vertical line going down the sleeves. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Mukanaki is one of the Greed Island players that confront Gon and Killua in Antokiba, in an attempt to steal their first specified slot card "Sword of Truth". 

Eventually, Mukanaki's name appears in Gon's binder when he checks to see which players he's encountered are either dead or alive. As it turns out, he has a white dot next to his name symbolizing he's alive in the game. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 158 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Mukanaki is capable of utilizing Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Though Mukanaki's name is technically given in the manga through Gon's Greed Island binder, the correspondence between the character and his name is only provided in the Hunter's Guide databook.
